name: Moose Stew Chop House
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Condensed beef broth (10-1/2 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté meat cubes in shortening until brown on all sides.
2. Add pepper, paprika, bay leaf, salt, beef broth, red wine, onion, and carrots to the pot.
3. Cover and simmer until the meat is tender, about 2 hours.
4. Add whole onions and potatoes; cover and simmer for an additional 15 minutes, or until the vegetables are barely tender.
5. Mix butter and flour into a paste.
6. Drop the paste into the simmering stew.
7. Cook, stirring, until the stew bubbles and thickens.
8. Serve with rice or polenta.
Adaptation from recipe by Phillip Velez, London Chop House (Detroit)
Campbell's Great Restaurants Cookbook, U.S.A.
